---
title: "Marie Claire Souvestre"
---

## Marie Claire Souvestre

**Dates:** (1835-1905)

### Description

translator, headmistress

### Biography

Mentioned as deciding not to translate <i>The Dove in the Eagles Nest</i>.

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 6th 1865

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
